title: Cookie Policy

meta.line1: Document describing the use of cookies and similar technologies on the TyPlace platform.
meta.line2: The current version is published on this page.

intro: This Cookie Policy explains what cookies and similar technologies may be used on the TyPlace platform, why they are used, and how the user may manage such technologies.

section1.title: 1. General provisions
section1.p1: The TyPlace platform may use cookies, browser local storage, and other similar technologies for the proper functioning of the site, remembering settings, ensuring security, and supporting service features.
section1.p2: By using the platform, the user understands that certain technical files and similar mechanisms may be necessary for the basic operation of the website and its features.

section2.title: 2. What technologies may be used
section2.p1: The platform may use the following categories of cookies and similar technologies:
section2.l1: strictly necessary — required for the basic operation of the website, authentication, security, and core platform functions;
section2.l2: functional — allowing the platform to remember language, currency, interface settings, and other user preferences;
section2.l3: technical — related to chats, support, safe transactions, internal checks, and other internal platform processes;
section2.l4: analytics or measurement tools — where the platform uses such tools to analyze stability, performance, and service improvement.

section3.title: 3. Why they are used
section3.l1: to sign the user into the account and maintain the user session;
section3.l2: to store selected language, currency, and certain interface preferences;
section3.l3: to ensure the proper operation of chats, support, orders, notifications, and other platform features;
section3.l4: to provide security, prevent abuse, and perform technical diagnostics;
section3.l5: to improve the stability, convenience, and overall performance of the platform.

section4.title: 4. Third-party services
section4.p1: The platform may use third-party technical, infrastructure, security, analytics, or payment services which, depending on their own logic, may use their own cookies or similar technologies.
section4.p2: The use of such technologies by third-party services is governed by their own rules and policies. The platform does not control the content of those external documents.

section5.title: 5. How the user can manage cookies
section5.p1: The user may manage cookies and similar technologies through browser settings, as well as by other means that may be available on the platform if such mechanisms are implemented.
section5.p2: Disabling necessary or technically required cookies may limit certain platform features or make proper use of the service impossible.

section6.title: 6. Changes to this policy
section6.p1: The platform may update this Cookie Policy. The current version is published on this page, and continued use of the platform after an update means acceptance of the new version to the extent applicable.

section7.title: 7. Related documents
section7.p1: The use of cookies and similar technologies is connected with the general data processing logic of the platform.
section7.p2: More information about the platform's approach to data is available in the
